name: TenantForge
summary: Control plane for database-per-tenant SaaS on Neon: provision an isolated project per customer, route connections, orchestrate fleet-wide migrations, and manage tenant lifecycle (suspend/offboard/residency).

env.name: DATABASE_URL
env.description: Control-plane registry Postgres (tenant metadata only — not tenant data).

env.name: NEON_API_KEY
env.description: Neon API key used to provision/delete a project per tenant.

env.name: NEON_ORG_ID
env.description: Neon organization id (the account is org-scoped) for project operations.

env.name: NEON_API_BASE_URL
env.description: Override for the Neon API base URL (defaults to the public API).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_HTTP_TOKEN
env.description: Bearer token required to run the HTTP control-plane API.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_BASE_URL
env.description: Base URL when calling the HTTP control-plane API.
